task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into ArkCase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ArkCase dashboard, navigation menu, or logged-in user interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the specific complaint case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a case details page or case folder open, typically with a case ID visible in the header or breadcrumbs.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the initial document in the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 'Documents' tab or section of the case, displaying the original document named 'scan_20240315'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the new document name and selected the new document type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show an edit properties modal or form where the document name field contains 'Response_Letter_March2025' and the document type dropdown/field is set to 'Correspondence'.

task_completion.description: Verify the changes were saved successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the document list or document details view reflecting the final saved state: the document is now named 'Response_Letter_March2025' and its type is listed as 'Correspondence'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the ArkCase GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a standard web browser interface (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) navigating the ArkCase web application, not a terminal or script editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or API scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show terminal windows executing curl commands, Python scripts, or direct ArkCase REST API calls to modify the document.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application UI and didn't just write the target values in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The target values ('Response_Letter_March2025' and 'Correspondence') must be entered into the actual ArkCase web forms, not a notepad, text editor, or unrelated application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The initial document is named 'scan_20240315' with a document type of 'Other'. The target document name is 'Response_Letter_March2025' and the target document type is 'Correspondence'.
